hero.subtitle: Software Developer Jr. & Full-Stack Developer

about.title: About Me
about.description: Passionate developer with experience in multiple technologies and team leadership
about.subtitle: Software Developer Jr.
about.p1: I am a student at Universidad Tecnológica de Torreón, focused on software development with practical experience in real projects covering web development, mobile and embedded systems.
about.p2: My experience includes working with modern technologies like React, Laravel, AdonisJS, Django, Python, and Swift, as well as leading development teams under agile methodologies.
